Programs

Three ways onto the floor.

Whatever brings you in — a wedding date, a curious kid, or a promise you made to yourself — there’s a program shaped for it.

Adult Classes

Group classes and private lessons for every level — including never-danced-before. No partner needed, no experience assumed. Just show up; we handle the rest.

Book a trial →

Kids Program

Technique, musicality, and confidence for young dancers — from their first steps in the studio to the bright lights of the competition floor.

Book a trial →

Wedding Dance

A first dance you’ll actually enjoy. Custom choreography built around your song, your timeline, and your comfort level — nerves included, nerves handled.

Book a trial →

Dance Styles

Two worlds. One floor.

We teach the full spectrum of partner dancing — the polished American and International syllabi for dancers with competitive ambitions, and the social dances that fill every party floor in Florida.

American Rhythm & Smooth · International Ballroom & Latin

The classic competitive styles — waltz to cha cha, foxtrot to samba — taught with real syllabus technique.

Social Dances

Salsa, bachata, swing, and more — everything you need to be the couple everyone watches at the next wedding.

Why Prestige

A studio that feels like a family — and trains like a team.

  • Competitive pedigree Our instructors train, perform, and compete on the professional circuit — and bring that standard to every lesson.
  • Every age, every level Four-year-olds to retirees, first-timers to medalists — the floor belongs to everyone.
  • A real community Showcases, socials, and team send-offs to competitions — students here cheer for each other.
  • Patient, structured coaching Clear technique, honest feedback, and progress you can feel from the very first lesson.

Your first lesson

Tell us what brings you to the floor — a wedding, a new hobby, your kid’s new passion — and we’ll match you with the right class and instructor. The trial lesson is the easiest step you’ll take all week.
